data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of full audit columns for tracking changes, specifically 'who changed what and when'. However, the evidence provided does not include any audit columns or logs that would confirm this requirement is met. The absence of such data indicates a gap in the implementation of the required auditing features.
gaps: No evidence of audit columns for tracking changes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
